definition: Time-specific FVG entry model during three daily algorithmic macro windows. ICT's most precise intraday entry — the algorithm delivers a displacement + FVG within a specific 60-minute window, and you enter on the FVG fill.
depends_on: fair_value_gaps (entry is an FVG fill within the macro window)
displacement (requires a 3+ ATR candle to create the FVG)
sessions_and_kill_zones (macro windows are sub-divisions of kill zones)
daily_bias (must align with HTF directional bias)
feeds_into: entry_models (Silver Bullet is a Grade A+ entry when all criteria align)
risk_management (tight SL = smaller risk per trade, higher R:R)

london_silver_bullet.context: London open manipulation — price sweeps Asian session liquidity then reverses
london_silver_bullet.typical_setup: Asian range high/low swept → displacement → FVG forms → enter on FVG fill

ny_am_silver_bullet.context: NY AM session continuation or reversal of London move
ny_am_silver_bullet.typical_setup: London high/low swept → displacement → FVG → entry

ny_pm_silver_bullet.context: Final institutional move before London close — often a reversal or continuation to EOD target
ny_pm_silver_bullet.typical_setup: Afternoon consolidation breaks → displacement → FVG → entry for EOD move

execution_rules.step_1: Identify daily bias BEFORE the macro window opens (use HTF structure + daily bias checklist)
execution_rules.step_2: Wait for the macro window to open — do NOT enter before the window
execution_rules.step_3: Watch for displacement: a single candle that moves 3+ ATR and creates an FVG
execution_rules.step_4: The FVG must form IN THE DIRECTION of your daily bias
execution_rules.step_5: Enter when price retraces to fill the FVG (limit order at FVG edge or CE)
execution_rules.step_6: SL below/above the displacement candle extreme (the liquidity sweep point)
execution_rules.step_7: TP at the next draw on liquidity — session high/low or PDH/PDL

mandatory: Active within one of the three 60-minute windows
enhancers: Liquidity sweep occurred just before displacement (+5 pts)
SMT divergence confirmed with correlated pair (+3 pts)
FVG overlaps with HTF order block (+5 pts)
Price at OTE (0.618-0.786) within dealing range (+3 pts)

risk_reward_profile.typical_sl: 15-30 pips forex, 50-150 pts indices, 100-400 pts BTC
risk_reward_profile.why_high_rr: Time-specific entry compresses the SL (you know exactly where the algo displaced from)

common_mistakes: Entering BEFORE the macro window opens (anticipating, not confirming)
Taking FVGs that form AGAINST the daily bias
Ignoring that the displacement must create the FVG (not just any old FVG)
Using Silver Bullet during news events (NFP, FOMC) — macro timing is disrupted
Trading all three windows — pick the one that aligns with your session focus

crypto_adaptation.note: Crypto trades 24/7 but still respects institutional time windows
crypto_adaptation.why: Institutional crypto desks operate during US business hours; CME BTC/ETH futures drive price discovery
crypto_adaptation.weekend: Silver Bullet is less reliable on weekends — no institutional flow

bridge_integration.is_silver_bullet_field: Already tracked in ICT analysis result
bridge_integration.score_impact: Silver Bullet window active + FVG formed = +8 to ICT score
bridge_integration.auto_detection: Check current UTC time against three windows; if active, flag FVGs formed in last 15 minutes as Silver Bullet candidates
bridge_integration.grade_boost: Grade B setup inside Silver Bullet window with all criteria = upgrade to Grade A
